question: Show the names of all of the high schooler Kyle's friends.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id JOIN Highschooler AS T3 ON T1.friend_id  =  T3.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
gold_sql_original: SELECT T3.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id JOIN Highschooler AS T3 ON T1.friend_id  =  T3.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT T3.name FROM friend AS T1 JOIN highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id JOIN highschooler AS T3 ON T1.friend_id  =  T3.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
agent_sql: SELECT h2.name FROM highschooler AS h1 JOIN friend AS f ON h1.ID = f.student_id JOIN highschooler AS h2 ON f.friend_id = h2.ID WHERE h1.name = 'Kyle' LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT h2.name FROM highschooler AS h1 JOIN friend AS f ON h1.ID = f.student_id JOIN highschooler AS h2 ON f.friend_id = h2.ID WHERE h1.name = 'Kyle' LIMIT 100
